title: lygodium venustum
intro: Lygodium venustum, also known as the Himalayan climbing fern, is a species of climbing fern that belongs to the family Lygodiaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in Ayurvedic medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Lygodium venustum include its potential to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and support digestive health. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make tea, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
